name: cloudflare-safety
description: Block destructive Cloudflare Wrangler operations — worker deletion, KV purge, D1 drops, and secret changes
author: sieteunoseis

hooks.name: Block worker and pages deletion
hooks.description: Prevents wrangler delete, wrangler pages project delete, and deployment rollbacks

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^(npx )?wrangler (delete|pages project delete|deployments rollback|rollback)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: wrangler delete/rollback removes deployed workers or pages. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block KV namespace deletion and bulk operations
hooks.description: Prevents wrangler kv namespace delete and kv bulk delete

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^(npx )?wrangler kv (namespace delete|bulk delete)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: wrangler KV delete operation. This removes data permanently."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block D1 destructive operations
hooks.description: Prevents wrangler d1 delete and dangerous SQL via d1 execute

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^(npx )?wrangler d1 delete '; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: wrangler d1 delete removes the database. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block R2 bucket deletion
hooks.description: Prevents wrangler r2 bucket delete which removes object storage

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^(npx )?wrangler r2 bucket delete '; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: wrangler r2 bucket delete removes object storage. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block secret changes
hooks.description: Prevents wrangler secret put and delete which modify worker secrets

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^(npx )?wrangler (secret|pages secret) (put|delete) '; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: wrangler secret modification. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }
